title: Check Weight
desc: Ensure the sacrificial animal is at least 2 years old and has proper weight.

title: Health Check
desc: Make sure the animal has veterinary certification and proper vaccinations.

title: Book in Advance
desc: Booking early ensures better price and availability of the animal.

title: Confirm Delivery
desc: Confirm delivery date and location at the time of booking.

title: Verify Price
desc: Check market rates before purchasing to ensure a fair price.

title: Check Photos
desc: Verify real images and videos of the animal before booking.

title: Get Proper Receipt
desc: Always collect a payment receipt or confirmation after booking.

title: Choose Suitable Animal
desc: Select an animal that meets your Qurbani requirements and preferences.

title: Check Seller Location
desc: Verify the seller’s location and authenticity before booking.
